overall.description: A cinematic third-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a covered industrial walkway with large ventilation fans, ascending a concrete stairwell, and emerging into a neon-lit urban plaza with towering holographic billboards. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections on wet pavement, dense atmospheric haze, and vibrant neon signage in pink, green, and blue hues.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered industrial walkway with large ventilation fans visible on the left wall. The camera follows a character with a purple glowing umbrella through the concrete corridor, passing other pedestrians walking in the same direction under artificial fluorescent lighting.

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past a brightly lit food cart with a vendor on the left side. The camera approaches a stairwell entrance at the end of the corridor while the industrial fans recede into the background. The crowd density increases slightly with more pedestrians visible near the food cart.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow concrete stairwell and begins ascending the steps. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting until approaching the top where bright daylight becomes visible. The purple umbrella character continues ahead, navigating the enclosed vertical space.

transition from dark stairwell to bright overcast daylight with neon accents

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the stairwell into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering futuristic buildings. A massive digital billboard tower dominates the center view while a bright pink 'wide open' sign glows on the left. The overcast sky is visible above as the character descends into the neon-lit urban environment.

passing by row of parked vehicles on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the covered pedestrian promenade with wet pavement reflecting vibrant pink and blue neon lights. Parked futuristic vehicles line the right side while various pedestrians walk along the path. Overhead digital displays and neon storefronts illuminate the sheltered walkway as the camera continues forward through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins in a covered concrete walkway, following a character with a purple glowing umbrella past large ventilation fans and a brightly lit food cart under artificial fluorescent lighting. As the camera reaches the end of the corridor, the scene shifts into a narrow, dimly lit stairwell, ascending through the enclosed vertical space toward a glimpse of bright light above. The camera then exits the stairwell to reveal a vast open plaza dominated by towering futuristic buildings and a massive digital billboard tower under an overcast sky. Finally, the view settles onto a covered pedestrian promenade where wet pavement reflects vibrant pink and blue neon lights, gliding past parked futuristic vehicles and glowing storefronts.
